documents.name: asyncio.md
documents.text:
# Async Runtime

Python asyncio runs coroutines on an event loop. Cooperative cancellation raises CancelledError at an await point and cleanup belongs in finally blocks.

documents.name: sqlite.md
documents.text:
# SQLite Durability

SQLite write-ahead logging uses a WAL file. Short transactions and a busy timeout reduce writer contention while preserving durable commits.

documents.name: tcp.md
documents.text:
# TCP Flow Control

TCP sequence numbers and acknowledgement numbers provide ordered delivery. The advertised receive window implements sliding-window flow control.

documents.name: rag.md
documents.text:
# Retrieval Grounding

A retrieval system should invalidate stale document versions, filter duplicate chunks, preserve source locators and abstain when evidence is missing.
